zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg於1202年出生在德國福萊斯塔阿特 歐登伯格阿赤 維爾德沙奧森時，他的父親Graf Burchard I von Oldenburg32歲，母親Kunigunde van Breda en Schoten22歲。他於1232年之前與Jutta van der Lede在德國福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫可萊斯 特可倫波格結婚。他去世於1234年5月27日在他的家鄉享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg于1202年出生在德国福萊斯塔阿特 歐登伯格阿赤 維爾德沙奧森时，他的父亲Graf Burchard I von Oldenburg32岁，母亲Kunigunde van Breda en Schoten22岁。他于1232年之前与Jutta van der Lede在德国福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_普洛文次 維斯特法倫可萊斯 特可倫波格结婚。他去世于1234年5月27日在他的家乡享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Oldenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Erwin, Fritz, Otto, Claus, Hans, Jurgen, Ruediger.

North German, Dutch, Danish, and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Oldenburg, the capital of the former principality of the same name, from the weak dative case (originally used after a preposition and article) of Middle Low German ald, old ‘old’ + burg ‘fortress, fortified town’.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg was born in 1202, in Wildeshausen, Oldenburg, Germany, his father, Graf Burchard I von Oldenburg, was 32 and his mother, Kunigunde van Breda en Schoten, was 22. He married Jutta van der Lede before 1232, in Tecklenburg, Westphalia, Prussia, Germany. He died on 27 May 1234, in his hometown, at the age of 32.

fr.Tecklenburg, Westfalen, Prussia: Kreis Tecklenburg, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg est né en 1202, à Amt Wildeshausen, Freistaat Oldenburg, Allemagne, son père, Graf Burchard I von Oldenburg, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Kunigunde van Breda en Schoten, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Jutta van der Lede avant 1232, à Kreis Tecklenburg, Provinz Westfalen, Prusse, Allemagne. Il est décédé le 27 mai 1234, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.Tecklenburg, Westfalen, Prussia: Kreis Tecklenburg, Provinz Westfalen, Freistaat Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg 1202 in Amt Wildeshausen, Freistaat Oldenburg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Burchard I von Oldenburg 32 und seine Mutter Kunigunde van Breda en Schoten 22. Er hat vor 1232 in Kreis Tecklenburg, Provinz Westfalen, Freistaat Preußen, Deutschland Jutta van der Lede geheiratet. Er starb am 27. Mai 1234 im Alter von 32 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg è nato il nel 1202 nel Amt Wildeshausen, Freistaat Oldenburg, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Burchard I von Oldenburg, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Kunigunde van Breda en Schoten, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Jutta van der Lede prima del 1232, nel Kreis Tecklenburg, Provinz Westfalen, Freistaat Preußen, Germania. Morì il 27 maggio 1234, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburgが1202年にドイツフレイスタアト オルデンブルグアムト ウィルデシャウセンで生まれた時，父Graf Burchard I von Oldenburgは32歳，母Kunigunde van Breda en Schotenは22歳であった。1232年以前にドイツフレイスタアト プレウssンプロヴィンズ ウエストファレンクレイス テックレンブルグでJutta van der Ledeと結婚した。彼は1234年5月27日に故郷で32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg(이)가 1202년 독일 프레이스타앳 덴버그 아트 윌데쇼센에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Burchard I von Oldenburg(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Kunigunde van Breda en Schoten(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1232년 이전 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 프로빈츠 웨스트파렌 크레이스 테클렌버그에서 Jutta van der Lede(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1234년 5월 27일 그의 고향에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg nasceu em 1202, em Amt Wildeshausen, Freistaat Oldenburg, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Burchard I von Oldenburg, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Kunigunde van Breda en Schoten, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Jutta van der Lede antes 1232, em Kreis Tecklenburg, Provinz Westfalen, Freistaat Preußen, Alemanha. Ele faleceu em 27 de maio de 1234, em sua cidade natal, com 32 anos.

ru.Tecklenburg, Westfalen, Prussia: крис теккленбург, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg родился в 1202 г. в местности амт уаилдешаусен, фристаат олденбург, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Burchard I von Oldenburg было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Kunigunde van Breda en Schoten, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Jutta van der Lede перед 1232 г. в местности крис теккленбург, провинз вестфеилен, Пруссия, Германия. Он умер 27 мая 1234 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 32 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Graf Heinrich III von Oldenburg nació en 1202, en Amt Wildeshausen, Freistaat Oldenburg, Alemania, su papá, Graf Burchard I von Oldenburg, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Kunigunde van Breda en Schoten, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Jutta van der Lede antes de 1232, en Kreis Tecklenburg, Provinz Westfalen, Freistaat Preußen, Alemania. Murió el 27 de mayo de 1234, en su pueblo, a la edad de 32 años.
